visual_description: The scene begins in a dark, debris‑filled setting where a sudden bright flash erupts, scattering sparks across the darkness. Sparks continue to fall as the camera reveals a long, dimly lit corridor with wooden beams. A group of people, led by a woman in a white shirt, walks forward down the corridor.
audio_description: A voice shouts a name in a foreign language, followed by the sound of an explosion and falling sparks.
